team.name: Mia Chen
team.bio: Mia founded Inpetto after 6 years in brand strategy and content at agencies across Sydney and Melbourne. She's obsessed with the intersection of creativity and data.

team.name: Jack Moretti
team.bio: Jack leads strategy across all client accounts. With a background in digital marketing at a Big 4 consulting firm, he brings rigour and creativity in equal measure.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: Priya manages paid social across Meta and TikTok for Inpetto's clients. She's managed over $2M in ad spend and has a knack for finding the creative angles that drive conversions.

team.name: Luca Fitzgerald
team.bio: Luca leads content production at Inpetto — overseeing video, photography, and design. He's worked with brands from streetwear startups to ASX-listed companies.

team.name: Sofia Nakamura
team.bio: Sofia manages Inpetto's influencer relationships and campaigns. She's built partnerships with over 500 creators across lifestyle, fashion, beauty, and food.

team.name: Omar Al-Rashid
team.bio: Omar turns data into decisions. He builds reporting dashboards, tracks growth metrics, and makes sure every strategy is informed by real insights.
